final:
// // When k=0 and l=0 and m=0, n should be 0; otherwise, n should be 1.
module top_module (
        input k,
        input l,
        input m,
        output reg n);assign n = ( ~k & ~l & ~m ) |
           ( ~k & ~l & m ) |
           ( k & ~l & ~m ) |
           ( k & ~l & m );

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // When k=0 and l=0 and m=0, n should be 0; otherwise, n should be 1.
